CE1.justification: The agent acted directly on the reported pattern without asking any clarifying questions or requiring the user to load or restate anything.

CE2.justification: Mostly compact and on-task, but the closing paragraph speculating about future escalation to decisions.md is an unrequested stretch of forward-looking prose.

CE3.justification: The response stated where the entry went (observations.md) and why in short in-line clauses (recurring cross-project pattern, not a commitment so not decisions.md, spans projects so not project-scoped).

CE4.justification: The two actions (create daybook, append observation) are each self-contained commits that would leave no orphaned or confusing partial state if interrupted.
